List Available Themes

Source: R/themes.R
hexmakr_themes.Rd

Returns a named list of all 19 built-in color themes for hex stickers. Each theme has dark and light sub-lists with color values for bg, accent, text, border, and sub (subtitle).

Usage

hexmakr_themes()

Value

A named list of length 19. Each element contains:

label

Human-readable theme name (character).

dark

List of 5 color hex strings for dark mode.

light

List of 5 color hex strings for light mode.

Details

List available themes

See also

hex_sticker(), hexmakr_preview_theme()

Other themes: hexmakr_icons(), hexmakr_preview_theme()

Examples

themes <- hexmakr_themes()
names(themes)
#>  [1] "stats"    "viz"      "bio"      "medical"  "tech"     "earth"   
#>  [7] "cran"     "bioc"     "tidy"     "genomics" "proteo"   "pharma"  
#> [13] "ocean"    "midnight" "cyber"    "neon"     "sunset"   "viridis" 
#> [19] "plasma"  
themes$stats$dark
#> $bg
#> [1] "#1B2838"
#> 
#> $accent
#> [1] "#00D4AA"
#> 
#> $text
#> [1] "#FFFFFF"
#> 
#> $border
#> [1] "#00D4AA"
#> 
#> $sub
#> [1] "#8EC8B8"
#>
